{
  "audit_summary": {
    "malicious_patterns_detected": true,
    "shadow_features_detected": true,
    "intent_alignment_status": "SUSPICIOUS",
    "summary_text": "The skill presents itself as a local credential hygiene auditor, but its documented logic directly enumerates and reads highly sensitive credential stores and inspects environment-variable secret values. While these actions are framed as auditing, the implementation goes beyond minimal metadata checks by loading full credential contents and deriving hashes, creating unnecessary exposure of secrets."
  },
  "vulnerabilities": [
    {
      "pattern_id": "E2",
      "title": "Environment variable secret harvesting",
      "risk_level": "HIGH",
      "file_location": "SKILL.md:51",
      "technical_analysis": "The documented environment-hygiene routine iterates over all environment variables, matches names against sensitive patterns, and accesses the corresponding values. Even though the example masks most characters, it still reads and discloses secret material from process environment state. This is direct secret harvesting from os.environ, which is a high-risk source because API keys, tokens, and passwords are common
